description: Address review issues: fix i18n interpolation to use replaceAll, translate hardcoded TemplePanel string, update harvest mandate description
steps: In src/i18n/index.ts, change both replace() calls in the t() function and useT() hook to use replaceAll() so repeated placeholders are substituted correctly
In src/components/TemplePanel.tsx, import useT from '../i18n' and replace the hardcoded 'Shinto Figures' heading with t('kamiModal.shintoFigures')
In src/i18n/en.ts, add a 'kamiModal.shintoFigures' key with value 'Shinto Figures'
In src/i18n/es.ts, add a 'kamiModal.shintoFigures' key with value 'Figuras Sintoistas'
In src/i18n/en.ts, update 'mandate.harvest' to 'Strongest player in each province gains its harvest reward'
In src/i18n/es.ts, update 'mandate.harvest' to 'El jugador mas fuerte en cada provincia obtiene su recompensa de cosecha'
acceptance_criteria: i18n interpolation uses replaceAll (or global regex) so repeated placeholders work
TemplePanel modal 'Shinto Figures' heading uses the i18n system
kamiModal.shintoFigures key exists in both en.ts and es.ts
mandate.harvest description accurately reflects what executeHarvest does
Build passes: npx tsc -b && npx vite build
